hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '(npm|pnpm|yarn|cargo)' && echo '[Hook] Long-running process detected — consider using run_in_background or a separate terminal' >&2 || true

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.md$' && echo "$FILE" | grep -qvE '(README|CLAUDE|codemap|plan-|research-|review-|session|\.claude/|references/|docs/|specs/|decisions/|packages/agents/|logs/tasks/)' && echo 'Blocked: avoid creating loose .md files. Only README.md, CLAUDE.md, .claude/ files, and packages/agents/ system files are allowed.' >&2 && exit 2 || true
jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git push' && echo '[Hook] Review your diff before pushing. Run /review-pr first.' >&2 || true

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.md$' || exit 0; [ -f "$FILE" ] || exit 0; LINES=$(grep -c '[^[:space:]]' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); HAS_HEADING=$(grep -c '^#' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); HAS_PLACEHOLDER=$(grep -cE '^\[|^TODO|^\.\.\.' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); [ "$HAS_HEADING" -eq 0 ] && echo '[Hook] .md missing heading — add a # title' >&2; [ "$LINES" -lt 5 ] && echo "[Hook] .md too sparse ($LINES lines) — every .md must justify its token cost" >&2; [ "$HAS_PLACEHOLDER" -gt 0 ] && echo '[Hook] .md has unfilled placeholders — complete or remove them' >&2; true
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); [ -f "$FILE" ] && grep -n 'console\.log' "$FILE" && echo '[Hook] console.log found — remove before committing' >&2 || true

HOOK=$(cat); OUTPUT=$(echo "$HOOK" | jq -r '.tool_response.output // ""' 2>/dev/null); BYTES=${#OUTPUT}; if [ "$BYTES" -gt 5120 ]; then KB=$((BYTES / 1024)); echo "[ctx] Large output: ${KB}KB in context. Next time use: ~/.claude/bin/ctx-exec \"intent\" command" >&2; fi; true
jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'grep -r' && echo '[Hook] Prefer mgrep over grep -r for ~50% token reduction' >&2 || true
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$' && pyright "$FILE" 2>&1 | grep -E '(error|warning)' | head -20 >&2 || true
git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l 'console\.log' 2>/dev/null | while read f; do echo "[Hook] console.log found in modified file: $f" >&2; done || true
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true
